01 — About

Backend engineer who ships
clean, scalable systems

I'm a Python Developer with hands-on experience building REST APIs, automation systems, and data processing pipelines. I care about writing code that's not just functional, but maintainable and well-documented.

My work spans integrating third-party APIs, designing scalable backend logic, and leveraging Pandas and NumPy to extract meaning from large datasets.

Currently finishing my B.Tech in Computer Science and actively seeking backend or full-stack roles where I can contribute to production-grade systems. Based in Hyderabad, India.

2026
Stock Market Price Tracker & Alert System
An automated stock monitoring application that processes large volumes of real-time market data and fires threshold-based alerts on price anomalies.
  • Processes 1,000+ stock records per session via real-time market APIs
  • Threshold-based anomaly detection with Pandas and NumPy
  • Automated data ingestion and report generation workflows

Real-Time Weather & Air Quality Analytics
A real-time environmental monitoring platform integrating weather and air quality APIs, normalizing multi-source data and visualizing actionable trends.

  • Reusable normalization and aggregation pipelines for multi-source data
  • Configurable alert thresholds and trend visualization
